description: CompositionGreen and black checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, has full length buttoned placket, short sleeves with button tabs, one pocket on the left chest with a brand embroidery above the pocket and a curved hem FitSlim Wash careHand or machine wash cold with a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironscullers brings a dash of style to your look with these casual checks. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants, denims or corduroys for stylish semi-formal and casual looks.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
